business.name: BinTech Washing Repair
business.niche: Washing machine and dryer repair company for homes in Dubai — brand-specific technicians (LG, Samsung, Bosch, Beko, Whirlpool), same-day and emergency appliance repair

notes: The pillar page targets the high-volume generic 'washing machine repair Dubai' demand, while brand pages (LG, Samsung, Bosch, Siemens, Whirlpool) capture BOFU brand-specific searches with strong local intent. The long tail of MOFU troubleshooting queries (not spinning, leaking, draining, dryer not heating, fill/standby leaks, won't start) should be split into dedicated diagnostic guide pages that funnel into the repair/booking CTA, since each symptom represents a distinct search intent and prevents keyword cannibalization across the huge near-duplicate long-tail set.

questions.q: why is my washing machine not spinning
questions.answer_angle: List top 3 causes (unbalanced load, broken belt, carbon brushes, lid switch) with the most common first for the featured snippet.

questions.q: how do I fix a washing machine that won't spin
questions.answer_angle: Give a short numbered troubleshooting checklist before recommending professional repair.

questions.q: why does the drum not rotate on my washing machine
questions.answer_angle: Explain drum belt/motor coupler failure as the leading mechanical cause with a repair cost hint.

questions.q: is it worth repairing a washing machine that won't spin in Dubai
questions.answer_angle: Compare average repair cost vs new machine price to justify a same-day repair call.

questions.q: can a technician fix a Samsung washer that won't spin same day
questions.answer_angle: Confirm same-day diagnostic and repair for spin motor/board faults with call-out time.

questions.q: why is my LG washing machine drum not rotating
questions.answer_angle: Name LG-specific fault codes for drum motor and reassure genuine LG parts are used.

questions.q: why is my washing machine leaking water from the bottom
questions.answer_angle: Point to the top 3 causes (door seal, drain pump, hose connection) and lead with the most frequent one.

questions.q: how do I stop my washer leaking from the door
questions.answer_angle: Explain door gasket wear and give a quick DIY check before booking a technician.

questions.q: is a leaking washing machine dangerous
questions.answer_angle: Warn about electrical risk and recommend switching off power immediately, then call for repair.

questions.q: why is water coming from underneath my Samsung washing machine
questions.answer_angle: Name Samsung's common bottom-panel drain hose fault and offer same-day inspection in Dubai.

questions.q: can a leaking washing machine be repaired or should I replace it
questions.answer_angle: Give a decision rule based on machine age and repair cost percentage of new unit price.

questions.q: why does my washing machine leak from the drain pipe
questions.answer_angle: Explain blocked/cracked drain pipe as cause and mention descaling as preventive fix.

questions.q: why is my tumble dryer not heating up
questions.answer_angle: Lead with the heating element failure as the top cause and mention thermal fuse as second.

questions.q: how much does it cost to fix a dryer that isn't heating in Dubai
questions.answer_angle: State an AED price range for heating element replacement including call-out.

questions.q: can I fix a dryer heating element myself
questions.answer_angle: Advise against DIY due to electrical risk and recommend certified technician visit.

questions.q: why does my Bosch tumble dryer run but not get hot
questions.answer_angle: Name Bosch-specific thermostat/element fault and confirm same-day diagnosis.

questions.q: is a dryer not heating worth repairing
questions.answer_angle: Compare heating element repair cost to a new dryer to guide the decision.

questions.q: why does my washing machine keep filling with water when turned off
questions.answer_angle: Explain a faulty inlet valve as the leading cause and advise shutting the water supply off immediately.

questions.q: why is my washing machine leaking water when not in use
questions.answer_angle: Point to a stuck inlet valve or siphoning drain hose position as top causes.

questions.q: is it normal for a washing machine to leak while filling
questions.answer_angle: Clarify it is not normal and usually signals a valve or hose seal fault needing prompt repair.

questions.q: why does my LG washing machine keep filling with water by itself
questions.answer_angle: Name the LG inlet valve/pressure sensor fault and note it's a fire/flood risk if ignored.

questions.q: what should I do if my washing machine floods when nobody is using it
questions.answer_angle: Recommend shutting off the water supply and booking an emergency same-day repair.

questions.q: why has my washing machine suddenly stopped working

questions.q: why won't my Samsung washing machine turn on
questions.answer_angle: Name Samsung control board or power supply fault and give a quick reset tip before booking repair.

questions.q: why does my washing machine stop mid rinse cycle
questions.answer_angle: Explain sensor or timer fault causing mid-cycle stop and note diagnostic fee waived on repair.

questions.q: why is my washing machine not working properly anymore

questions.q: who repairs a washing machine that won't start in Dubai same day

questions.q: why won't my washing machine drain and spin
